mapper.select: SELECT a.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, a.region FROM accommodations a WHERE a.status = 'ACTIVE' AND (#{isAdmin} = TRUE OR a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId}) ORDER BY a.name ASC, a.accommodation_id ASC

SELECT r.room_id, r.accommodation_id, r.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, r.room_code FROM rooms r JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = r.accommodation_id WHERE r.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} AND r.status = 'ACTIVE' AND rt.status = 'ACTIVE' AND a.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY rt.name ASC, r.room_code ASC, r.room_id ASC

SELECT rb.block_id, a.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, rb.room_id, r.room_code, r.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, rb.start_date, rb.end_date, rb.reason_type, rb.reason_text, rb.status, rb.created_by_user_id, u.login_id AS created_by_login_id, u.name AS created_by_name, rb.created_at FROM room_blocks rb JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = rb.room_id JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = r.accommodation_id JOIN users u ON u.user_id = rb.created_by_user_id WHERE (#{isAdmin} = TRUE OR a.host_user_id = #{hostUserId}) AND ( #{accommodationId} IS NULL OR a.accommodation_id = #{accommodationId} ) AND ( #{roomId} IS NULL OR rb.room_id = #{roomId} ) ORDER BY rb.created_at DESC, rb.block_id DESC

SELECT r.room_id, r.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, r.room_type_id, rt.name AS room_type_name, r.room_code, r.status AS room_status, a.host_user_id FROM rooms r JOIN room_types rt ON rt.room_type_id = r.room_type_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = r.accommodation_id WHERE r.room_id = #{roomId} FOR UPDATE

SELECT rb.block_id, rb.room_id, r.room_code, a.accommodation_id, a.name AS accommodation_name, a.host_user_id, rb.status, rb.start_date, rb.end_date, rb.reason_type, rb.reason_text FROM room_blocks rb JOIN rooms r ON r.room_id = rb.room_id JOIN accommodations a ON a.accommodation_id = r.accommodation_id WHERE rb.block_id = #{blockId} FOR UPDATE
